panel.cardDescription: Nine-dimensional composite risk metric · delta-based numerical root cause analysis
panel.defaultBannerBody: Based on your incident description, AI proposes t₀ and t₁ scores for all nine dimensions. You can adjust them manually if needed.
panel.scoresDescription: Pre-incident (t₀) and at-incident (t₁) scores per dimension. Adjust with sliders or generate with AI.
panel.dualReportBody: The largest-Δ̂ dimension ({maxDeltaCode}) differs from the highest-weighted dimension ({weightedCode}). The stability condition is broken — the report should include both override mode and base score mode.
panel.summaryDescription: Score · largest deviation · theorem status · override
panel.profileTitle: Nine-dimensional risk profile + root cause chain
panel.profileDescription: Pre-incident (t₀) vs at-incident (t₁) comparison + priority ranking
panel.detailDescription: Nine-dimension heat map · deviation severity (Δ̂) · priority share · waterfall
panel.aiEvalDescription: Generated by RiskNova AI · expert review required
panel.pdfShareHoverTitle: Build a PDF and send via your device share sheet (WhatsApp, Mail, AirDrop, etc.)
panel.pdfDownloadWarnTitle: Warning: AI scoring not run yet — PDF may show empty charts

heatmap.ariaLabel: Nine-dimension heat map — t₀ / t₁ / delta
heatmap.title: Dimension heat map

waterfall.title: Contribution waterfall
waterfall.empty: No broken dimensions — waterfall not available.

rootChain.ariaLabel: Root cause chain — nine dimensions in four categories

pdf.defaultReportSubtitle: Nine-dimensional composite risk metric · delta-based root cause analysis
pdf.emptyStateWarning: ⚠ No analysis data yet. All dimensions have Δ̂ = 0 — pre-incident and at-incident scores are identical. For a meaningful report, first generate scores with {aiButton} or adjust the sliders, then create the PDF again.
pdf.chartDeltaSub: Deviation bars for 9 dimensions, ordered C1→C9
pdf.chartDonutSub: P(C_i) = w_i · Δ̂_i — broken dimensions only
pdf.sectionHeatmapWaterfall: Dimension detail · heat map and priority accumulation
pdf.sectionPolarDelta: Priority polar distribution + Δ̂ radar profile
pdf.chartPolarSub: Equal angle per dimension, radius = Δ̂ magnitude
pdf.chartDeltaRadarSub: Deviation magnitudes only — where risk increased
pdf.rootChainSub: Broken dimensions in priority order — Override / Major / Sec. categories
pdf.tableFootnoteLegend: Δ̂_i = max(0, t₁ − t₀) · Priority P(C_i) = w_i · Δ̂_i · Scores on [0,1] continuous scale · Higher = higher risk
pdf.popupBlocked: Could not open the print window. Please check your pop-up blocker.
